sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59725" key="krathth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρᾰτ-ητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59725.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who holds</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possesses</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἱερῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:228" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">228</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
